name: Orion OPS-01 Daily Platform + Graph Verify
description: Enterprise OPS: SSH VPS /root/orionprime/auto runbooks/daily-health.sh. verify:r1/r2/r4. NO scaffold.

prompts:
Paste prompts/MANDATORY-BRIEF.txt first.

OPS-01: SSH VPS. bash /root/orionprime/auto/runbooks/ensure-catalog-on-vps.sh && cd /root/orionprime/auto && bash runbooks/daily-health.sh

PASS → list OK lines (includes GRAPH-01 verify:r1).
FAIL → report failed checks + journalctl -n 20. No stub fixes in OPS run.
